_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Lotus Arena
project.address: Plot No. SC-01/A2, Sports City, Sector 79, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201305
project.description: Stalled residential development on 12.5 acres, originally a Sports City landmark. Severe legal and title crisis with active Enforcement Directorate (ED) money-laundering investigations.
project.long_description: Lotus Arena is a highly distressed residential development spread over 12.5 acres in Sector 79's Sports City. Developed by Arena Superstructures Private Limited (a subsidiary of Nirmal Singh's Lotus Greens / Three C consortium), the project was designed as a premium sports-centric theme township consisting of 9 towers rising G+28 floors with 1,080 proposed apartments. While a resolution plan by Purvanchal Projects Pvt Ltd (valued at ₹584 Crore) was approved by the NCLT Principal Bench, a monumental Allahabad High Court judgment on February 24, 2025, stayed and criticized the insolvency as a fraud designed to evade liability. The court found that promoters fraudulently sold 785 flats collecting ₹387 Crores, siphoned off ₹113.45 Crores, failed to build Sports City infrastructure, and referred the case to the Enforcement Directorate (ED) under the PMLA. No bipartite registries are active, and the land lease is deeply disputed by the Noida Authority.
marketing_claims: NCLT approved Resolution Plan (Under Court Review)
project.project_risk_flag: Extreme: Developer under NCLT bankruptcy, severe siphoning fraud, and Allahabad High Court ED PMLA referral.
registry_embargo_reasons: Active Corporate Insolvency Resolution Proceedings (CIRP) under NCLT.
Allahabad High Court February 2025 judgment staying resolution plan due to fraud.
Active Enforcement Directorate (ED) PMLA siphoning investigation.
Colossal outstanding land lease dues to the Noida Authority.

builder.name: Arena Superstructures Pvt Ltd (Lotus Greens)
builder.company_overview: Arena Superstructures Private Limited is a highly distressed real estate subsidiary of the Lotus Greens / Three C group promoted by Nirmal Singh. Under active corporate insolvency (CIRP) since October 2020, the company's ex-management is facing serious criminal prosecution. In February 2025, the Allahabad High Court stayed its insolvency process, declaring it a fraudulent attempt to escape liability after siphoning off over ₹113 Crore in buyer funds, and referred the developers directly to the Enforcement Directorate (ED).

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Comfort
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK (Stalled Construction)
unit_types.description: Standard 3 BHK layout featuring three open balconies, vitrified tiles, and modular kitchen design conduits.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK Premium + Servant
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK with servant quarters (Stalled)
unit_types.description: Standard 3 BHK layout featuring integrated family lounge, kitchen with attached service entrance balcony, and servant quarters.

assumptions: Project is completely stalled and in serious legal litigation.
Resale transactions and registries are entirely frozen.

payment_plan.notes: Insolvency resolution stayed by Allahabad High Court.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Lotus Arena is a highly toxic, severely mired real estate asset caught in active Enforcement Directorate money-laundering prosecution and an absolute registry embargo.
why_buy: Severely Depressed Entry: Prices are quoted at half the market average of Sector 79, though this comes with massive risk.
why_avoid: Active ED PMLA Prosecution: The Allahabad High Court stayed the insolvency resolution in February 2025 and referred the promoters to the ED.
Colossal Misappropriation of Funds: Promoters fraudulently siphoned off ₹113.45 Crores from 785 homebuyers.
Complete Registry Freeze: Bipartite registrations are blocked, and the Noida Authority land lease is deeply disputed.
decision_profile.best_for: None. This project is a highly distressed and legally blocked property.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: All retail homebuyers, corporate end users, NRI capital preservers, and standard yield investors.

buyerPersonas.headline: Extreme Risk Play
reasons: Buying is an absolute gamble on long-term legal restructuring.

riskRadar.description: Construction completely halted, towers in incomplete shell stages.
Under corporate insolvency, stays by High Court, and ED investigations.

persona_profile.motivation_note: Unscrupulous distress property play; completely unsuitable for standard home seekers.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Lotus Arena represents an extreme-risk, legally toxic real estate asset. In February 2025, the Allahabad High Court stayed the approved resolution plan, declaring the entire CIRP insolvency a fraud to escape liability. Homebuyers should avoid this project entirely.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Entirely toxic for end use. Construction is halted, towers are in raw concrete shell formats, and registries are blocked.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Avoid completely. Siphoning of ₹113 Crores and active ED PMLA money-laundering audits make this asset highly radioactive.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Unsafe and uninhabitable. Raw concrete towers, incomplete promised utilities, and a total freeze on property rights.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Extremely high risk of total capital write-down. Do not invest.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: None. Distressed concrete structures with incomplete landscaping and zero active club services.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Extreme. Deeply entangled in NCLT disputes, high-court registry embargos, and federal criminal investigations.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Walk away. Do not commit any funds to this distressed project.

competitors.this_project_advantage: None (Lotus Arena has a toxic legal standing).
competitors.competitor_advantage: Fully completed construction, active registries, clean title, and robust ready-to-move-in wellness gentry.
competitors.verdict: Elite Golf Greens represents absolute physical and legal safety; Lotus Arena is a legally toxic blocked property.
competitors.price_delta_note: Lotus Arena is listed at half the rate of Elite, reflecting its extreme title penalty.
